  │ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget && git
  │ add packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/widgetIcons.jsx
  │ packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/ComponentSetWidget.jsx && git commit -m "fix:
  │ register mirror icon for ComponentSet flip-layout action…
  └ 16 lines...

● Fixed and pushed (b344b662).

  The "mirror" icon wasn't registered in ICON_REGISTRY, so the flip-layout button was
  rendering the text "flip-layout" inside a 24×24px circle — effectively invisible.

  Two changes:

   1. widgetIcons.jsx — added MirrorIcon from @primer/octicons-react and registered it
  as 'mirror'
   2. ComponentSetWidget.jsx — added return true from handleAction for consistency

  The button should now show the mirror icon and work on click. HMR should pick this up
  live.

  rendering the text "flip-layout" inside a 24×24px circle — effectively invisible.

  Two changes:

  The button should now show the mirror icon and work on click. HMR should pick this up
